visual_description: A man with short dark hair stands behind metal bars, his face illuminated by dim greenish light as he looks off to the side. The scene shifts to a man in a dark suit and tie, wearing an earpiece, who adjusts his earpiece and holds a phone to his ear while standing in a dimly lit control room with monitors in the background. A close‑up shows a woman with dark hair looking forward with a tense expression.
audio_description: The audio features a man speaking into a telephone with a steady, serious tone, and faint background noise is present.
